sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_symbols (id Int32, symbol String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT demangle(symbol) AS function_name FROM test_symbols WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_symbols SET symbol = '0x7fff5fbff1c0' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT arrayStringConcat(arrayMap(s -> demangle(s), arrayJoin([symbol])), ', ') AS demangled_symbols FROM test_symbols;
